CONTENT.Club career: Ben Seghir made his professional debut for Nice in a 3–1 Ligue 1 loss to Dijon on 29 November 2020, coming on as a late-match substitute.On 22 June 2021, Ben Seghir signed a contract to join fellow Ligue 1 club Marseille.On 8 September 2023, Ben Seghir moved on loan to Xamax in Switzerland.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Ben Seghir is of Moroccan descent and holds both French and Moroccan nationalities. He is the older brother of fellow footballer Eliesse Ben Seghir.
CONTENT.International career: Ben Seghir is a youth international for France, having represented the country at under-17 level.

SUMMARY: Salim Ben Seghir (born 24 February 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a winger.
